title: Meow Cinema
description: A minimal modpack for you to watch movies with your friends
body:
# Transform your Minecraft server into a shared movie theatre! Meow Cinema is a minimalist modpack designed to provide a unique experience of watching movies with your friends directly in Minecraft. With only 21 mods! This pack offers: - Complete focus on shared viewing experience - Movie Streaming Play videos directly in the game - Perfect Synchronization Keep all players in the same moment of the movie - Low Resource Consumption - Lightweight modpack that doesn't overload the server Ideal For a Movie night with friends or Player communities that enjoy shared activities Note: Meow Cinema does not include any Movie Theater maps by default, it's intended to be used in the Meow Server, directly with the Cinema map made by @zOldStyle on Instagram or for you to bring your own Movie Theatre map
A special thank you to all the developers of the mods in this pack!
  • Architectury by shedaniel
  • Carpeted by Mehvahdjukaar
  • CreativeCore by CreativeMD, AriaFreeze
  • Decorative Lamps by Tobs
  • EntityCulling by tr7zw
  • Fabric API by FabricMC
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • Figura by skyrina, lumelia, UnlikePaladin, omoflop
  • Framework by MrCrayfish
  • Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
  • Moonlight by MehVahdJukaar
  • More Slabs Stairs & Walls by Nibaru
  • MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished by MrCrayfish
  • Sodium by JellySquid (jellysquid3)
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
  • Trank-O-Mat by Markus Bordihn
  • WaterFrames by SrRapero720
  • WaterMedia by SrRapero720, Goedix
  • [Let's Do Addon] Corn Expansion by Ninjdai, KalWantsPizza, Satisfy
  • [Let's Do] Bakery by satisfy
  • [Let's Do] Farm & Charm by satisfy, jason13official
